title: Delegation Readiness Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger delegation readiness foundations judgment so founder performance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Delegation Readiness Foundations is a leverage point inside founder performance. It supports the broader goal of decision-making, time allocation, energy management, and resilience.
coreConcepts: Delegation Readiness Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good delegation readiness foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Delegation Readiness Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
